details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation of a Prisma generator package. All rubric requirements met: (1) Package structure with proper package.json referencing prisma dependencies; (2) Entry point (src/bin.ts) correctly uses generatorHandler with onManifest and onGenerate callbacks from @prisma/generator-helper; (3) Generator implementation (src/generator.ts) properly reads and iterates over dmmf models; (4) For each model, generates TypeScript interfaces (model interface, CreateInput, UpdateInput, WhereInput, WhereUniqueInput) and all 5 CRUD methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) with proper types via dedicated builders; (5) Generated code written to output directory via fs.writeFileSync in onGenerate; (6) Code follows TypeScript conventions, Prisma generator patterns, includes JSDoc, private field syntax, proper error handling (RestClientError), comprehensive test suite covering edge cases, and correct build/config setup. The implementation is modular, well-structured, and handles nuanced requirements like read-only field exclusion from CreateInput, composite key fallbacks, and relation field optionality.
